WHAT_IF_RELICS_WHAT_IF_ENTRY.title: What If Only...
WHAT_IF_RELICS_WHAT_IF_ENTRY.description: Choose a relic that changes the rules of the run.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_WHAT_IF_SKIP.title: Skip
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_JACKPOT.des:
When obtained, transform all cards in your deck into [gold]Jackpot[/gold].
Card rewards contain only [gold]Jackpot[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_TRIPLE_PLAY: Relic drops and treasure chest relics become 33 only.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SERIES_RELI: What If Only Seven Sin Pigs
Relic drops and treasure chest relics become Seven Sin Pig series relics only.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_QUESTION_MA:
All rooms on the map become unknown rooms.
Except for Ancient, Rest Site, and Boss rooms.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_BIG_BANG.de:
When obtained, transform all cards in your deck into [gold]Big Bang[/gold].
Card rewards contain only [gold]Big Bang[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_WHISTLE.des:
When obtained, transform all cards in your deck into [gold]Whistle[/gold].
Card rewards contain only [gold]Whistle[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_STRIKE.desc:
When obtained, transform all cards in your deck: the first becomes [gold]Hellraiser[/gold], the rest become random [gold]Strike[/gold] cards.
Card rewards contain only cards with the [gold]Strike[/gold] tag.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_DISCOVERY.d:
When obtained, transform all cards in your deck into [gold]Discovery[/gold].
Card rewards contain only [gold]Discovery[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_DIRECT_FLIG: When obtained, enables travel mode, allowing you to freely select any room on the map.
Relic drops and treasure chest relics become [gold]Heartsteel[/gold] only.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_OLD_COIN.de: Relic drops and treasure chest relics become [gold]Old Coin[/gold] only.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_OLD_COIN.fl: Money isn't everything, but having none gets you nowhere.
Relic drops and treasure chest relics become [gold]White Star[/gold] only.
Amid countless stars, only this one.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_DRAGON_FRUI: Relic drops and treasure chest relics become [gold]Dragon Fruit[/gold] only.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_HISTORY_COU: Relic drops and treasure chest relics become [gold]History Course[/gold] only.
Study the past, and you'll know the rise and fall.
Relic drops and treasure chest relics become [gold]Chemical X[/gold] only.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_BING_BONG.d: Relic drops and treasure chest relics become [gold]Bing Bong[/gold] only.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ALL_CARDS_A: What If Every Card Is Iron Wave
Whenever you play a card, gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold] and deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_I_AM_SNAKEB: At the start of your turn, apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to a random enemy.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ANGRY.title: What If Angry
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ANGRY.descr: At the end of your turn, add 1 [gold]Anger[/gold] to your discard pile.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_RARE.t: What If I Could Only Get Rare Cards
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_RARE.d:
When obtained, transform every card in your deck into a random [gold]Rare[/gold] card.
Card rewards only offer [gold]Rare[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_UNCOMM: What If I Could Only Get Uncommon Cards

When obtained, transform every card in your deck into a random [gold]Uncommon[/gold] card.
Card rewards only offer [gold]Uncommon[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_COMMON: What If I Could Only Get Common Cards

When obtained, transform every card in your deck into a random [gold]Common[/gold] card.
Card rewards only offer [gold]Common[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_ATTACK: What If I Could Only Get Attack Cards

When obtained, transform every card in your deck into a random [gold]Attack[/gold] card.
Card rewards only offer [gold]Attack[/gold] cards.
The best defense is a good offense.
What If I Could Only Get Skill Cards

When obtained, transform every card in your deck into a random [gold]Skill[/gold] card.
Card rewards only offer [gold]Skill[/gold] cards.
What If I Could Only Get Power Cards

When obtained, transform every card in your deck into a random [gold]Power[/gold] card.
Card rewards only offer [gold]Power[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_COLORL: What If I Could Only Get Colorless Cards

When obtained, transform every card in your deck into a random [gold]Colorless[/gold] card.
Card rewards only offer [gold]Colorless[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SNAKEBITE.d:
When obtained, transform all cards in your deck into [gold]Snakebite[/gold].
Card rewards contain only [gold]Snakebite[/gold].
When obtained, reduce your HP to [blue]10%[/blue] of max HP and add a [gold]Underdog's Triumph[/gold] to your deck.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_TEN_YEAR_BA: What If Only Ten Year Bamboo
Relic drops and treasure chest relics become [gold]Ten Year Bamboo[/gold] only.
Get ten Ten Year Bamboos and ascend straight to godhood.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ANCIENT_CAR:
When obtained, remove the Basic cards from your deck and add all Ancient cards to it.
Card rewards contain only Ancient cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_DRAMATIC_EN:
When obtained, transform all cards in your deck into [gold]Dramatic Entrance[/gold].
Card rewards contain only [gold]Dramatic Entrance[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_MONSTER_ELI: What If All Monsters Become Elites
Turn all normal enemy rooms into Elite rooms.
We're here to fight the elites!
What If I Had Every Relic
When obtained, directly gain every in-game relic you do not already own, excluding relics that take effect immediately on pickup or interfere with rewards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ALL_FORMS.t: What If I Had All Forms
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ALL_FORMS.d: When obtained, add all Form cards to your [gold]deck[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ALL_FORMS.f:
If I had all forms,
If I had all form.
When obtained, gain [gold]Frozen Egg[/gold], [gold]Toxic Egg[/gold], and [gold]Molten Egg[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_FORGE_PERSI: After combat, your current [gold]Forge[/gold] is not cleared and is restored at the start of the next combat.
Forged a hundred times, never melted down.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SHA.title: What If Only Kill
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SHA.descrip:
When obtained, transform all cards in your deck into [gold]Kill[/gold].
Card rewards contain only [gold]Kill[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_DOUBLE_MAP_: Doubles the map length of each act.
Long and winding is the road ahead.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ELITE_BEFOR: What If There's Always an Elite Before Rest
Every room directly before a [gold]Rest Site[/gold] becomes an [gold]Elite[/gold] room.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_INFINITE_UP: What If I Could Upgrade Forever
All cards can be upgraded infinitely.
One more time, and one more time again.
